tpa-cmd-tpa-desc: Request a teleport to another player
tpa-cmd-tpahere-desc: Request to teleport another player to you
tpa-cmd-tpaccept-desc: Accept a teleport request. Specify player name/nickname if you have multiple requests
tpa-cmd-tpdeny-desc: Deny a teleport request. Specify player name/nickname if you have multiple requests
tpa-cmd-tpallow-desc: Allow or deny all teleport requests from other players
tpa-privilege-desc: Ability to use the /tpa and /tpahere commands
tpa-error-need-temporal-gear: You must hold a temporal gear to initiate a teleport request. (This will consume it)
tpa-error-cooldown: Please wait {0} hours between teleport requests.
tpa-error-target-disabled: Player has teleport requests from other players disabled.
tpa-error-existing-request: You already have an outgoing request to {0} {1} (expires in {2}). Use /tpacancel to cancel it.
tpa-error-consume-gear-failed: Failed to consume temporal gear. Please try again.
tpa-error-multiple-requests: You have multiple teleport requests from: {0}. Please specify which one to {1}: /tp{1} [player]
tpa-error-no-outgoing: No outgoing teleport request to cancel.
tpa-notify-request-goto: {0} has requested to teleport to you.
tpa-notify-request-bring: {0} has requested to bring you to them.
tpa-notify-request-hint-multiple: Type `/tpalist` to see all requests, `/tpaccept` to accept, or `/tpdeny` to deny.
tpa-notify-request-hint-single: Type `/tpaccept` to accept, or `/tpdeny` to deny.
tpa-notify-accepted: Your teleport request has been accepted!
tpa-notify-timeout: TPA request from {0} has timed out.
tpa-notify-gear-returned-hand: Your temporal gear has been returned to your hand.
tpa-notify-gear-dropped: Your temporal gear has been dropped on the ground since your inventory and hands are full.
tpa-success-request-sent: Teleport request has been sent to {0}.
tpa-success-denied: You have denied the teleport request from {0}.
tpa-success-cancelled: Your teleport request has been cancelled.
tpa-expire-timeout: Your TPA request to {0} has timed out.
tpa-expire-denied: Your teleport request has been denied!
tpa-expire-player-rejoin: Your temporal gear from a timed-out TPA request has been returned!
tpa-expire-cancelled: Your TPA request to {0} has been cancelled.
tpa-expire-default: Your TPA request has been cancelled.
tpa-expire-gear-returned: Your temporal gear has been returned.
tpa-expire-gear-failed: Failed to return your temporal gear. (this is probably a mod bug, report this!)
tpa-list-empty: You have no incoming teleport requests.
tpa-list-item-bring: wants to bring you to them
chat-cmd-adminsetnick-desc: Admin: Get or set another player's nickname. Use 'force' before the nickname to bypass conflict warnings.
chat-cmd-adminsetnickcolor-desc: Admin: Get or set another player's nickname color
chat-cmd-envhere-desc: Send an environment message placed where you are looking
chat-cmd-emotemode-desc: Turn Emote-only mode on or off
chat-cmd-rptext-desc: Turn the whole RP system on or off for your messages
chat-cmd-chatprefs-desc: View or change your chat accessibility and color preferences
chat-cmd-langcolor-desc: Turn language colors on or off for your chat view
chat-cmd-yell-desc: Set your chat mode to Yelling, or yell a single message
chat-cmd-say-desc: Set your chat mode back to normal, or say a single message
chat-cmd-whisper-desc: Set your chat mode to Whispering, or whisper a single message
charsheet-cmd-view-desc: View your character sheet, or another online player's character sheet
charsheet-cmd-look-desc: Look at a nearby player and read their visible character details
charsheet-cmd-set-desc: Set one of your character sheet fields
charsheet-cmd-clear-desc: Clear one or all of your character sheet fields
charsheet-cmd-admin-view-desc: Admin: View all of another player's character sheet fields
charsheet-cmd-admin-set-desc: Admin: Set another player's character sheet field
charsheet-cmd-admin-clear-desc: Admin: Clear one or all of another player's character sheet fields
charsheet-empty: No character sheet fields are set.
charsheet-look-empty: You notice no additional character details.
charsheet-error-look-range: You need to be within {0} blocks to look closely.
charsheet-error-look-los: You need line of sight to look closely.
charsheet-error-field-not-found: Cannot find character sheet field '{0}'. Valid fields: {1}
charsheet-error-field-readonly: {0} cannot be edited from this view.
charsheet-error-admin-privilege: You do not have permission to edit character sheets as admin.
charsheet-required-warning: You need to complete required character sheet fields before using RP chat: {0}. Use /setbio <field> <value>.
charsheet-gui-disabled: Character sheets are disabled on this server.
chat-env-placement-fallback: No surface found in that direction — message placed above your head instead.
chat-nick-none: You don't have a nickname!  You can set it with `/nick MyName`
chat-nick-conflict: The nickname '{0}' is already taken by {1} (as their {2}). Please choose a different nickname.
chat-nick-set: Okay, your nickname is set to {0}
chat-nick-admin-no-nick: Player {0} does not have a nickname! You can set it with `/adminsetnick {0} NewNickname`
chat-nick-admin-conflict-warn: WARNING: The nickname '{0}' conflicts with {1} (as their {2}). This can cause confusion and weird behavior. Consider using a different nickname, or if you really want to proceed, use `/adminsetnick {3} force {0}` to override this warning.
chat-nick-admin-set: Player {0} nickname has been set to: {1}.  Old Nickname: {2}{3}
chat-nickcolor-none: You don't have a color set! You can set it with `/nickcolor [color]`
chat-nickcolor-admin-none: Player {0} does not have a nickname color!  You can set it with `/adminsetnickcolor {0} NewColor`
chat-nickcolor-admin-set: Player {0} nickname color has been set to: {1}.  Old Nickname Color: {2}
chat-rptext-set: RP Text is now {0} for your messages.
chat-ooc-disabled: OOC chat toggle is disabled on this server.
chat-gooc-disabled: Global OOC is disabled on this server.
chat-nickreset-notify: Your nickname '{0}' has been reset because player '{1}' joined the server.
chat-nickrequirement-warning: You need a nickname to use proximity chat! You can set it with `/nick MyName`
chat-babble-warning: Warning: You are speaking in babble. Other players may not understand you.
lang-cmd-addlang-desc: Add one of your known languages
lang-cmd-removelang-desc: Remove one of your known languages
lang-cmd-listlang-desc: List your known languages, and all available languages.
lang-cmd-adminaddlang-desc: Add a language to another player's known languages
lang-cmd-adminremovelang-desc: Remove a language from another player's known languages
lang-error-max-languages: You cannot learn more than {0} languages! Remove one first.
lang-error-system-disabled: The language system is disabled on this server.
lang-error-admin-max-languages: {0} cannot learn more than {1} languages! Remove one first.
lang-warning-admin-over-max-languages: Warning: {0} now knows {1} languages, which is above the configured player limit of {2}.
lang-notify-no-languages: You now know no languages! If you try to speak, you will only {0} incoherently!
lang-notify-new-default: You were speaking {0}. Since you removed it, you are now speaking {1}.
lang-notify-admin-no-languages: {0} now knows no languages! If they try to speak, they will only {1} incoherently!
lang-notify-admin-new-default: {0} was speaking {1}. Since you removed it, they are now speaking {2}.
lang-notify-admin-no-valid-default: {0} unlearned their default language, but no valid default language was found!
lang-notify-class-grant: Your {0} background grants you knowledge of {1}!
lang-notify-class-revoke: You have forgotten {0} as you are no longer a {1}.
heritage.class.gain: Your {0} background grants you knowledge of {1}.
heritage.class.loss: You no longer benefit from your {0} background for {1}.
heritage.trait.gain: Your traits grant you knowledge of {0}.
heritage.trait.loss: You no longer benefit from your traits for {0}.
heritage.model.gain: Your {0} form grants you knowledge of {1}.
heritage.model.loss: You no longer have access to {1} as a {0}.
stats-cmd-playerstats-desc: Get your player stats, or another player's
stats-cmd-clearstat-desc: Clear a specific stat on a player
stats-error-must-be-player: You must be a player to use this command.
stats-error-player-offline: Cannot clear stats for '{0}' - player must be online.
stats-error-stat-not-found: Cannot find stat '{0}'. Valid stats: {1}. IDs: {2}.
stats-confirm-clearstats: Are you SURE you want to clear this player's stats? Type "/clearstats {0} confirm" to confirm.
stats-confirm-clearstat: Are you SURE you want to clear this player's stat? Type "/clearstat {0} {1} confirm" to confirm.
repair-cmd-setdurability-desc: Sets the durability of the item held in your hand
repair-error-no-durability: Held item does not have durability.
repair-error-invalid-durability: Durability must be a number or percentage such as 100%.
parser-error-missing-quote: Missing closing quote. If you're trying to search for a player with nickname containing spaces, enclose it in quotes (e.g., "player nickname").
parser-syntax-explanation: {0} is the name, nickname, or uid of an online player.
parser-error-player-not-found: No online player with name or nickname '{0}' exists
chat-cmd-chatter-desc: Toggle character voice chatter on or off when players speak
chat-chatter-disabled: Character chatter is disabled on this server.
chatprefs-status: Chat visual preferences | language colors: {0} | labels: {1} | preset: {2} | nickname colors: {3}. Use /chatprefs help for commands.
chatprefs-help:
Chat preference commands:
/chatprefs languagecolors on|off
/chatprefs labels on|off
/chatprefs preset default|highcontrast|coloruniversal|protanopia|deuteranopia|tritanopia|monochrome
/chatprefs langcolor <language> <hex|default>
/chatprefs nickcolors on|off
/chatprefs ooccolor <hex|default>
/chatprefs gooccolor <hex|default>
/chatprefs emotecolor <hex|default>
/chatprefs reset
chatprefs-langcolor-status: Language colors are {0} for your chat view.
chatprefs-langcolor-set: Language colors are now {0} for your chat view.
chatprefs-labels-status: Language labels are {0} for your chat view.
chatprefs-labels-set: Language labels are now {0} for your chat view.
chatprefs-nickcolors-status: Nickname colors are {0} for your chat view.
chatprefs-nickcolors-set: Nickname colors are now {0} for your chat view.
chatprefs-gooc-disabled: Global OOC is disabled on this server, so GOOC color preferences cannot be changed here.
chatprefs-langcolor-override-set: Language color override for {0} set to {1}.
chatprefs-reset: Chat visual preferences reset to defaults.
rpchar-cmd-create-desc: Create a new RP character slot
rpchar-cmd-select-desc: Switch to an RP character slot
rpchar-cmd-archive-desc: Archive an inactive RP character slot
rpchar-cmd-admin-list-desc: List an online player's RP character slots
rpchar-cmd-admin-select-desc: Force an online player to an RP character slot
rpchar-error-no-active: No active RP character is available.
rpchar-error-max-active: You already have the maximum {0} active RP characters.
rpchar-error-duplicate-name: You already have an active RP character named '{0}'.
rpchar-error-valid-online-player: A valid online player is required.
rpchar-error-switch-in-progress: A character switch is already in progress for this account.
rpchar-error-switch-failed: Character switch failed before it could be completed: {0}
rpchar-error-switch-rollback-failed: Character switch failed and rollback also failed: {0}
rpchar-error-switch-dead: Cannot switch RP characters while dead.
rpchar-error-switch-hand-use: Cannot switch RP characters while the active hand action is still running.
rpchar-error-switch-mounted: Cannot switch RP characters while mounted because unmounting failed.
rpchar-error-switch-cursor: Cannot switch RP characters while carrying an item on the cursor.
rpchar-error-switch-open-container: Cannot switch RP characters while an external container is open.
rpchar-error-switch-crafting-grid: Cannot switch RP characters while the crafting grid contains input items.
rpchar-error-archive-active: Cannot archive the active RP character. Switch to another character first.
config-admin-save-tooltip: Persist changes and live-apply safe settings.
config-admin-mark-reviewed-tooltip: Mark every listed setting as reviewed.
config-admin-group-tooltip: Choose which group of settings to show.
language-config-help: Edit configured language definitions. Arrays are comma-separated. Name removals are pruned for online players and on future joins; default/grant changes apply during language initialization or heritage reconciliation.
language-config-status-ready: Select a language, edit its details, then Save to persist changes.
language-config-selected-tooltip: Choose the language shown in the editor on the right. Unsaved edits are kept when switching languages.
language-config-order-tooltip: Use Up and Down to reorder the selected language before saving.
language-config-editing-tooltip: Only this selected language is shown here. Pick another language from the list to edit it.
language-config-name-tooltip: Unique display name stored on player language data. Renames are reconciled for online players and future joins.
language-config-prefix-tooltip: Unique chat prefix players type after a colon, for example :c. Avoid spaces and reserved command syntax.
language-config-description-tooltip: Admin-facing description for what this language represents.
language-config-color-tooltip: Hex text color used when this language is displayed. The preview uses the current draft color after the editor redraws.
language-config-default-tooltip: Whether new or reconciled player language data receives this language by default.
language-config-hidden-tooltip: Hide this language from normal player language lists while keeping it usable if granted or known.
language-config-syllables-tooltip: Comma-separated syllables used to obfuscate speech for listeners who do not understand this language.
language-config-classes-tooltip: Comma-separated character classes/backgrounds that should grant this language.
language-config-traits-tooltip: Comma-separated character traits that should grant this language.
language-config-models-tooltip: Comma-separated exact player model codes that should grant this language.
language-config-model-groups-tooltip: Comma-separated player model group names that should grant this language.
language-config-add-tooltip: Add a new draft language and select it for editing.
language-config-delete-tooltip: Delete the selected draft language. Save to persist the deletion.
language-config-up-tooltip: Move the selected language earlier in the saved language order.
language-config-down-tooltip: Move the selected language later in the saved language order.
language-config-reload-tooltip: Discard draft language edits and reload the server's config file from disk.
language-config-save-tooltip: Validate and persist the full language list to the server config.
language-config-close-tooltip: Close the language editor without saving additional draft changes.
language-config-added-draft: Added a draft language. Edit its name and prefix before saving.
language-config-deleted-draft: Deleted the selected draft language. Save to persist this change.
language-config-moved-draft: Moved the selected language. Save to persist the new order.
language-config-delete-last: At least one language must remain configured.
